name: Cinnamon Chip Bread: 1 1/2-pound Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups King Arthur Unbleached All-Purpose Flour®
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the cinnamon chips into the bread machine pan.
2. Program for raisin or mixed bread setting and start the cycle.
3. If using a Zo V20, set the digital timer to 27 minutes.
4. Add the cinnamon chips at the end signal of the cycle.
